description: Node.js Express web application with MongoDB database, user authentication with session cookies, user profile with personal data including name email phone and social security number, employee benefits management, retirement calculator, financial allocations system, admin functionality, password reset via security questions, memo system between users

vulnerabilities.name: Injection (NoSQL)
vulnerabilities.description: NoSQL injection in login allowing authentication bypass via MongoDB operator injection

vulnerabilities.name: Broken Authentication
vulnerabilities.description: Session fixation, weak password requirements, insecure remember-me

vulnerabilities.name: Sensitive Data Exposure (SSN)
vulnerabilities.description: Social security numbers stored in plaintext and exposed in API responses

vulnerabilities.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference
vulnerabilities.description: IDOR on employee benefits and allocations endpoints

vulnerabilities.name: Security Misconfiguration
vulnerabilities.description: X-Powered-By header exposed, missing security headers

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Scripting
vulnerabilities.description: Stored XSS in memo functionality between users

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Access Control
vulnerabilities.description: Admin endpoints accessible without proper role verification

vulnerabilities.name: CSRF
vulnerabilities.description: Profile update and password change vulnerable to CSRF

vulnerabilities.name: Unvalidated Redirects
vulnerabilities.description: Open redirect after login via manipulated redirect parameter

vulnerabilities.name: Server-Side Request Forgery
vulnerabilities.description: SSRF through URL parameters in research/lookup features

vulnerabilities.name: Privacy - PII Linkability
vulnerabilities.description: User SSN, financial data, and personal info all linkable in single profile view
